items: arch of both feet, legs (optional), one crook of elbow, inside arm, back of shoulder (optional), torso/waist, hand of outside arm
inside arm wraps around pole at elbow, outside arm can be bent and hand is holding the pole at / above the head (relative to the inverted athlete)
inside arm is in elbow grip, outside arm is in grip of choice
both legs are fully extended in straddle position
